instruction: Add an image "none.png" on the Desktop to slide 2 with 1cm*1cm size.

evaluator.eval: compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/31_2.pptx', 'dest': '31_2.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/c82632a4-56b6-4db4-9dd1-3820ee3388e4/31_2_Gold.pptx', 'dest': '31_2_Gold.pptx'}), examine_shape=False, examine_image_size=True, approximately_tolerance=0.01)
